mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS "id", s.register_id AS "registerId", s.department_id AS "departmentId", s.schedule_date AS "scheduleDate", s.item_type AS "itemType", s.title AS "title", s.status AS "status", s.created_by AS "createdBy" FROM follow_up_day_schedule s WHERE s.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS "id", register_id AS "registerId", observation_date AS "observationDate", observed_by AS "observedBy", confirmed_at AS "confirmedAt", note AS "note" FROM follow_up_daily_observation WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND observation_date = #{observationDate} LIMIT 1

SELECT e.id AS "employeeId", e.realname AS "realName", d.dept_name AS "departmentName", d.id AS "departmentId" FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = e.deptment_id WHERE e.id = #{employeeId} LIMIT 1
SELECT deptment_id FROM register WHERE id = #{registerId} LIMIT 1
